name: Build a Star Schema from 3NF
description: Transform a normalized OLTP schema into a dimensional star schema for analytics

checks.name: fact_sales has 6 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sales;
checks.description: One row per order line item (6 items across 4 orders)

checks.name: Total revenue matches
checks.query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount), 2) AS total FROM fact_sales;

checks.name: dim_date covers Jan-Feb 2025
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM dim_date WHERE date_key BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-02-28';
checks.description: dim_date should have 59 days (31 in January + 28 in February 2025)

checks.name: All fact_sales dates exist in dim_date
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sales f WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dim_date d WHERE d.date_key = f.order_date);
checks.description: Every order_date in fact_sales must have a matching row in dim_date
